source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #79
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
We are launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
We are creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
If you would like to support our efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
WHY Star Atlas Is GROUNDBREAKING!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video talking about why Star Atlas is ground breaking.
Sage Labs Showdown Thus Far
Beyond the Horizon posted a video talking about his showdown with Atlas Theory.
Metaverse Nomads #112 Star Atlas w/ Viktor and Kenny – Aephia Industries
Metaverse Nomads posted a video replay of their weekly Star Atlas livestream.
Star Atlas: Calling all Usturs
OCG Thor posted a video about organizing players in the Star Atlas Ushur faction.
Star Atlas Reveals the Third Generation of the Ship Configuration System
Star Atlas published an article about the next update to Star Atlas ship configurations.
WEEKLY STAR ATLAS NEWSLETTER #97
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Star Atlas Referral Program with Massive Revenue Sharing Deal Gets Revolutionary Web3 Upgrade Powered by Buddy Link
Star Atlas published an article about their updated referral program called Starpath.
Star Atlas: How To Play SAGE Labs ($1.2M+ in prizes!)
TLDR posted a video about how to play SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas Sage Labs Pre Game!
Beyond the Horizon posted a video about getting ready for Star Atlas SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas Resource Locations
The Hologram published an article about the locations in SAGE Labs.
Star Atlas Announces Breakthrough Feature Atlas PRIME for Paying Solana Network Fees in ATLAS
Star Atlas published an article about a new service call Atlas PRIME.
Star Atlas – ALL Resource Locations Revealed for Sage Labs.
Atlas Theory posted a video about locations in SAGE Labs.
The Atlas Brew #80 one more day
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Brew #80: Reflecting On Our Journey – TLDR
TLDR posted a video recapping the latest Atlas Brew.
STARPATH V2 – EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO KNOW
Aephia posted an article about Star Atlas Starpath.
Star Atlas: How To Buy a Ship for SAGE Labs
TLDR posted a video about how to buy a Star Atlas ship.
Star Atlas: Prepping for Sage Labs
OCG Thor posted a video about prepping for SAGE Labs.
STAR ATLAS #199 The Calm Before The Storm!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video about updates in Star Atlas.
Star Atlas – Starpath and a SECRET Snapshot!?
Atlas Theory posted a video about Star Atlas Starpath.
Starpath Referral Guide – A breakdown of Star Atlas NEW revenue sharing program
RahMega posted a video about the Star Atlas referral program called Starpath.
Star Atlas: Star Path… but actually worth it!
OCG Thor posted a video about Star Atlas Starpath.
Star Atlas – Sage Labs – How To Get Started – Mining Step by Step Tutorial
Nebular TV posted a video about how to mine in SAGE Labs.
How to Play SAGE Labs – Walkthrough
DominicVain posted a video walking through SAGE Labs.
